audit_items.proof_trace: The ended condition at lines 249-253 precisely implements the property: `auctionStart + auctionDuration < block.timestamp` (i.e., elapsed > duration) OR `(isPriceValid && assetBalanceUsdValue < minAuctionSizeUsd)`. Asset params cannot be removed during live auctions (line 611 guards `s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0`), preventing any decimal-0 skip from producing a false negative. The `isPriceValid` guard correctly prevents a stale/zero price from triggering a spurious dust termination.
